description: Fetch feed based on channel IDs

parameters.name: channel_ids
parameters.description: Comma separated list of up to 10 channel IDs e.g. neynar,farcaster

parameters.name: with_recasts
parameters.description: Include recasts in the response, true by default

parameters.name: viewer_fid
parameters.description: Providing this will return a feed that respects this user's mutes and blocks and includes `viewer_context`.

parameters.name: with_replies
parameters.description: Include replies in the response, false by default

parameters.name: members_only
parameters.description: Used when filter_type=channel_id. Only include casts from members of the channel. True by default.

parameters.name: fids
parameters.description: Comma separated list of FIDs to filter the feed by, up to 10 at a time

parameters.name: should_moderate
parameters.description: If true, only casts that have been liked by the moderator (if one exists) will be returned.
